query: Recent French 2027 presidential first-round voting intention polls testing Marine Le Pen by name, June-July 2026, with pollster, fieldwork dates, and Le Pen percentage. Include Ifop, Harris Interactive, Toluna, Elabe, Odoxa, IFOP polls.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key finding:

**The pivotal fact:** Marine Le Pen only declared her 2027 candidacy on **7 July 2026** (on TF1, after an appeals court upheld her conviction). This means most **June 2026 polls tested Jordan Bardella** as the presumptive RN candidate—**Le Pen was tested by name in the first round only in the polls conducted right after 7 July**.

**Polls testing Marine Le Pen by name (July 2026):**

| Pollster | Client | Fieldwork | Sample | Le Pen 1st round |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Ifop-Fiducial** | LCI / Le Figaro | 7–8 July 2026 | 984 registered voters | **36%** |
| **Toluna Harris Interactive** | M6 / RTL | 7–8 July 2026 | 1,592 registered voters | **34–36%** |
| **Elabe** | BFMTV / La Tribune Dimanche | ~8–9 July (pub. 11 July) | n/a | **34–35.5%** |

**June 2026 context (mostly Bardella, not Le Pen):** Ifop 22–24 June ~32%, OpinionWay 10–11 June ~33%, Odoxa (Bardella) 32%.

**Notes on your list:** "Harris Interactive" and "Toluna" are the same poll—it's branded **Toluna Harris Interactive** (M6/RTL). I found no standalone June–July 2026 **Odoxa** poll testing Le Pen *by name* in the first round (Odoxa's June barometer used Bardella). Across the three post-candidacy pollsters, Le Pen consistently scores **34–36%**, clearly leading; the real uncertainty is over second place (Philippe vs. Mélenchon vs. Attal).
